_note: One-off manual bracket-scoring overrides, keyed by slug (the /p/<slug> code), for people who joined the knockout bracket long after the window closed. See scoring.js bracketScoreOpts(). Add an entry once the person has submitted and you know their slug — find it via the D1 export or their /api/entry confirmation. Example: "Xa9k2": { "lateSfBonus": 2, "zeroRounds": ["R32"] }
